name: Benchmark report
about: Report a Balloon benchmark or rerun result
title: "[Benchmark] "
labels: benchmark
assignees: ''
---

## Benchmark type

- four-lane pilot
- long-session benchmark
- SlopCodeBench starter suite
- other

## Scenario or problem

Name the scenario, fixture, or SCBench problem.

## Lanes compared

- baseline
- deterministic
- assist
- staged

## What changed

Summarize the most important result in 2-4 lines.

## Scores or outcome

Paste the scorecard totals or the key quality verdict.

## Correction tax notes

Did the extra Balloon lane feel worth the latency or extra complexity?

## Artifacts

Link or paste:

- screenshots
- scorecards
- tool outputs
- commit references

## Claim boundary

Confirm this report does not overstate the result beyond the actual benchmark evidence.
